text.title: zero-click-search-adaptation Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for zero-click-search-adaptation as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Treating AI Overview appearance as a failure metric.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: If your content triggers an AI Overview, it means your content is authoritative enough to be cited. The goal is to be the cited source inside the Overview, not to avoid the Overview appearing entirely.

failure-mode.description: Stuffing FAQ schema with questions that do not appear visibly on the page.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Google ignores or penalizes invisible FAQPage markup; only mark up Q&A that exists in the rendered DOM.

failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: AI citation rate is lagging by 60-90 days; short-window verdicts produce false negatives and trigger premature reversals.
